En: It is but one of the many strange *optic-atmospheric* phenomenon on this wondrous archipelago. You're sure you once saw sundogs -- in your youth. And blue flares....
Zh: 不过是这个奇妙岛屿上众多*大气光学*异象的其中之一。你确定自己看见过幻日——年轻的时候见过。还有蓝色的耀斑……

En: It is not my flag, he thinks -- my flag is the signal blue of the Zone of Control.
Zh: 这不是我的旗帜，他暗自思忖——我的旗帜是控制区的信号蓝。

En: The flag doesn't seem to mind, it's just a colourful fabric with a sun sewn onto it. Like all feudal flags, it looks like a children's drawing.
Zh: 旗帜好像不是很介意，毕竟它只是一块绣着太阳的彩色布料而已。就像所有的封建旗帜一样，看起来宛如孩童的画作。

En: This is the flag of Revachol the Suzerainty.
Zh: 这是瑞瓦肖宗主国的旗帜。
上面的太阳是什么意思？
幸好知道了这个。[放弃思维。]

En: This isn't just one sun, but there are little suns dancing around the big sun. This is the Sevenfold Sun Miracle.
Zh: 不是只有一个太阳，在大太阳周围还有舞动的小太阳。就是所谓的七日奇迹。

En: It's an optical atmospheric anomaly the first settlers saw. Happens in cold weather: six small suns around the big one. This complex halo-phenomena is how old Revachol got its flag.
Zh: 那是第一批定居者看到的大气光学异象。天冷的时候就会发生：有6个小太阳把一个大太阳围在中央。这种复杂的光晕现象就是旧瑞瓦肖旗帜的灵感来源。

En: Mhm. He looks around the apartment. "The tenant is an *old fashioned* guy."
Zh: “嗯。”他看了看这间公寓。“这个租客应该是个*作风老派*的家伙。”

En: Lieutenant -- the old flag of the Suzerain. (Point)
Zh: “警督——是宗主国的旧旗帜。”（指向它。）

En: Bow down before the flag. [Finish thought.]
Zh: 对着旗帜鞠上一躬。[完成思维。]

En: Don't bow to the flag. [Finish thought.]
Zh: 不要对旗帜鞠躬。[完成思维。]

En: By 'old fashioned' he means 'very right wing'.
Zh: 他口中的“作风老派”，其实指的是“极右翼派”。

En: The flag accepts your honourable salute with quiet dignity.
Zh: 旗帜庄严肃穆地接受了你诚挚的敬意。

En: The lieutenant does not bow to the flag -- it accepts your salute with quiet dignity.
Zh: 警督没有向旗帜鞠躬——它庄严肃穆地接受了你诚挚的敬意。
